statement.markdown:
markdown: ## Wave Animation Challenge
Create an interactive wave animation that responds to the user's mouse position. The wave should be a series of connected circles with varying colors and sizes. The animation should be smooth and seamless, with no visible jumps or gaps.

### Requirements
1. The animation should update in real-time as the user moves their mouse.
2. The wave should consist of at least 10 circles, each with a unique color and size.
3. The animation should be smooth and responsive, with a frame rate of at least 60 FPS.
4. The user should be able to pan and zoom the wave using the mouse.
5. The animation should be optimized for performance and should not consume excessive system resources.

    <title>Wave Animation</title>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="style.css">
</head>
<body>

    <script src="script.js"></script>
</body>
